47.reason: [Error: Duplicate values (gain == data) are not inserted, but the problem requires right child to be >= root. Should be 'else' to include equal case.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Duplicate values (gain == data) are not inserted, but the problem requires right child to be >= root. Should be 'else' to include equal case.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should be 'else' to handle duplicates (>=) as right child, per problem statement. Using 'else if' ignores duplicate values.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The problem specifies that the right child's value should be greater than or equal to the root's value. Using 'else if (gain > ...)' ignores the case where gain equals the root's value, causing duplicate values not to be inserted. It should be 'else'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  根据题意，右子节点的值应大于或等于根节点的值。此处使用 else if (gain > (*tree)->data) 会遗漏等于根节点值的情况，导致输入重复值时无法正确插入右子树。应改为 else 或 else if (gain >= (*tree)->data)。

51.reason: [The insertion logic ignores equal values (i.e., when gain == (*tree)->data), which violates the problem's BST rule that right child should be "greater than or equal". This causes duplicate values to be silently ignored, leading to an incorrect tree structure.]
